name: Amelia Stewart
ai_summary: Amelia Stewart is a 21-year-old with several years of toddler care experience, skilled in supporting early development through structured play and daily routines. She is patient and nurturing, focused on creating engaging learning experiences that build confidence and social skills in young children.
